title: Heavy Lift Engineer / Naval Architect (Cargo Lifting / Marine Transportation)
description:
• Working location at Harbourfront

• Working hour: Monday – Friday (8:30am – 5:30pm)

• AWS + Variable Bonus

• Excellent Welfare & Benefits

• Well Established MNC Freight Forwarding Company

Job Scope

  • Support the Regional Heavylift / Technical Manager in managing day-to-day activities of the Operations andProject Teams involving heavy lift, oversized, and high-value cargo, in accordance with company safety standards and procedures.
  • Attend and supervise daily site operations, including coordination and inspection meetings when required.
  • To guide the inter-functional teams to steer in the heavylift and technical aspects in business development, project management, engineering, planning and control
  • To ensure company‘s HSE, Technical and Operational standards are followed for the works contracted
  • To develop process driven procedures and SOPs in optimizing deployment, scheduling and execution in areas of heavylift and technical
  • To design and provide lifting plans, transportation plans, stowage plans, cargo securing plans and any other required CAD drawings as per project requirements
  • To liaise and coordinate effectively with client representatives, marine warranty surveyors, port authorities, and subcontractors for technical matters
  • To issue, review and verify engineering calculations and Method of Statements, Risk assessments.
  • To conduct route and site surveys and feasibility studies
  • Any other secondary duties / tasks which may be assigned
  • Overseas business travel as and when required

Requirement

  • Degree / Diploma in Mechanical / Structural / Marine Engineering or relevant discipline
  • Possess NEBOSH and / or similar certification is a plus
  • 2 – 4 years of working experience in similar role in international logistics industry

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume:

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

KHOO SOT MEI (R21102604)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492
